jsonLd.title: Hiring Category Manager at Nykaa
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Nykaa. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Category Manager to strengthen our Kochi-based team.

About Nykaa:
Nykaa is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nykaa!
